speaker: speaker1
text: Are you going to buy a bicycle ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I ’ m thinking about it . How much is it ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , dear . It ’ s too expensive . Can you give me a better price ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Your discount is already included . Normally we charge ¥ 400 , but now we can give you a special price . This is our sale period .

speaker: speaker2
text: It ’ s still too much . Can ’ t you make it any cheaper than that ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Sorry , but this is the best price . You can ’ t get it any cheaper than here .

speaker: speaker2
text: I see . Can I pay by traveler ’ s checks ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm afraid you can ’ t . You ’ re welcome to pay in cash .
